description: CompositionGreen and yellow printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a cross-over V-neckline, tape details on the chest and seams on the yoke, short sleeves and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironThere's a bright, gypsy style fabric pattern trending in fashion circuits at the moment which is already selling like hot cakes on myntra - so you'll stay in trend when you wear this biba kurta. Fashioned to please your colour fetish, this piece can be styled with colourful capris or conservative leggings. Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
